creator: gslin@gslin.org
text:
Plagger is a pluggable RSS/Atom feed aggregator and remixer platform.

Everything is implemented as a small plugin just like qpsmtpd, blosxom
and perlbal. All you have to do is write a flow of aggregation, filters,
syndication, publishing and notification plugins in config YAML file.

WWW:	http://search.cpan.org/dist/Plagger/

Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77
